task_objective: Refactor the inline log display into a Decky modal overlay.
design_decisions: Use ConfirmModal with bAlertDialog enabled so the modal shows only the OK action.
Use Decky's installed showModal export from @decky/ui because @decky/api 1.1.3 does not export showModal.
Remove inline log state and render logs in a selectable, scrollable monospace modal body.
results: Changed Show Logs to open the modal with the current log entries.
Removed the inline log rendering block.
Validated frontend static tests, frontend build, and the local pre-commit hook.
